channel.title: +Heat on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Heat on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Fridge
item.description: Parameters Size Mini fridge - 50-90 litres Single door fridges are smaller. 165L - 280L capacity. (Slightly small - used in bengaLUru India.) Double door fridges (One for freezer). 235-415L. Side-by-side: freezer on the left and the fridge on the right French door type, with freezer and fridge vertically separated. Minimize air escape when open. Power consumption, Energy efficiency Approximated by stars (1-5). As per BEE guidelines, energy rating will see a 1 point drop in all 2020 models.

item.title: Microwave oven
item.description: History SM34B3F Supra Microwave Oven, 34L. Used for a long time.
